safest_plan.stop_basis: below the 0.034 higher-timeframe demand order block — a 12h close under 0.032 breaks the structure the buy zone sits on

stance_by_source.summary: Wants to buy a pullback into the 0.034-0.036 demand zone, but only if it lines up with the broader market; targets a reclaim toward 0.052 then 0.066.

plain_english: Only one source covers BRETT, and it is bullish but patient: it wants to buy lower, in the 0.034-0.036 area where buyers have stepped in before, and only if the wider crypto market agrees. Price right now is around 0.0497 — well above that buy zone — so there is nothing to do at this level. Wait for a pullback to roughly 0.034-0.036; if it holds, the move targets about 0.052 and then 0.066, with the idea cancelled on a 12-hour close below 0.032.
